dataList.name: In the Past
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Past [過去]" activated
- Gain different effects based on Stack:
· 0~10: Skills наносит +1 more Burn Potency and Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills наносит +2 more Burn Potency and +1 more Burn Count
· 21~30: Финальная сила +2; Skills наносит +3 more Burn Potency and +2 more Burn Count
- макс. Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Present
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Present [現在]" activated
- Gain different effects based on Stack:
· 0~10: Skillsполучает +1 more Poise Potency and Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skillsполучает +2 more Poise Potency and +1 more Poise Count
· 21~30: Финальная сила +2; Skillsполучает +3 more Poise Potency and +2 more Poise Count
- макс. Stack: 30

dataList.name: In the Future
dataList.desc:
- Passive "Future [未來]" activated
- Gain different effects based on Stack:
· 0~10: Skills наносит +1 more Bleed Potency and Count
· 11~20: Clash Power +1; Skills наносит +2 more Bleed Potency and +1 more Bleed Count
· 21~30: Финальная сила +2; Skills наносит +3 more Bleed Potency and +2 more Bleed Count
- макс. Stack: 30

dataList.name: Temporal Disjunction
dataList.desc:
- Gain 1 Stack every time this unit switches between In the Past / In the Present / In the Future
- Take +(Stack x 15)% damage (макс. 150%)
- Начало хода: At 10 Stack, gain 5 Fragile
- макс. Stack: 10

dataList.name: Flower-burying Pin [埋花針]
dataList.desc:
- макс. Stack: 10
- Gain 1 Offense Level and 1 Defense Level за каждые 2 Stack
- At 5+ Stack, Финальная сила +1
- At макс. Stack, Coin Power +1
- When consuming Flower-burying Pin, give 1 E.G.O resource of the least-owned Affinity за каждые Stack consumed

dataList.name: Dragon's Blood [龍血]
dataList.desc:
- макс. Potency: 50
- Конец хода: Take 1% ХП damage per Potency (min 1; cannot be Staggered by this effect)
- Lose 1 Count when using a Defense Skill (один раз за ход)
- Конец хода: Double Potency and lose 1 Count
- This effect can be removed only by reducing Count to 0

dataList.name: "It"
dataList.desc:
